title: TECHNICAL CONSULTANT - MEDICAL EQUIPMENT (SINGAPORE)
description:
KEY AREAS OF RESPONSIBILITIES

•     Collaborate on fulfilling technical implementation deliverables such as detailed design documentation, system build, configuration and testing

•     Based on customer requirements, serves as a consultant to provide technical recommendations that best suit the environment

•     Resolve technical issues and offer proactive technical support

•     Documentation of solutions to ensure support teams and other consultants can participate in support and onward development

•     Contributes to the collective learning of Philips, seeking to share knowledge globally; assesses and shares repeatable processes that can be leveraged across multiple projects

•     Practices configuration management and version control

•     Execute activities as described in the Philips Excellence Process Framework

•     Is a key member of the implementation project and/or service team; fosters collaboration through sharing experiences, information, perspectives, skills and expertise.


JOB OVERVIEW

•     This position represents the fully qualified, career level position. Uses skills as a seasoned and experienced professional with full understanding of domain-specific practices, company policies, processes, and procedures. Solves a wide range of problems in creative ways. Works on problems of diverse scope. Demonstrates good judgement in selecting methods and techniques for solving problems.

•     Career-level professionals, who are fully qualified, experienced professionals. A seasoned, experienced professional with a full understanding of area of specialization; resolves a wide range of issues in creative ways. Has a complete knowledge of company products and services. Frequently interacts with customers, and/or functional peer group managers, normally involving matters between functional areas, other company divisions or units, or customers and the company. Often must lead a cooperative effort among members of a project team.

•     Works on problems of diverse scope where analysis of data requires evaluation of identifiable factors. Demonstrates good judgment in selecting methods and techniques for obtaining solutions. Networks with senior internal and external personnel in own area of expertise

Education & Training

•     High school graduate degree level or equivalent. Have completed undergraduate courses on Information Technology, Computer sciences or similar. Advanced degree preferred on Information Technology, Computer sciences or similar.

ABOUT COMPANY:

 MEDICAL EQUIPMENT (Singapore)

One of the world's leading Medical Equipment manufacturers (#1 MedTech Company as per BCG in 2020). They have a proud heritage of ground-breaking innovation that stretches back almost 130 years. Their innovations are driven by consumer and customer needs. Helping people to live healthily and prevent disease. Giving clinicians the tools they need to make a precision diagnosis and deliver personalized treatment.

Their innovative products range from patient monitoring, Ultrasound, Image-guided therapy, Diagnostic and clinical informatics, Magnetic resonance imaging, Computed tomography

postedCompany.description:
We are an innovative and mindful Systems Integration company that help customers address their IT Infrastructure requirements by delving into their problems and trying to solve them with efficiency and competitively. 

We are partnered with the leading IT vendors in the technology arena. Our IT partners are HP, IBM, Dell, Cisco, Juniper, Fortinet, Microsoft, VMware, Symantec, Trendmicro.

IT Support - Provide Hardware support and renewal of licenses

Security Solutions

- Application Firewall Designed and Optimized for Oracle E-Business Suite
- PCI Security Assessment
- Vulnerability Scanner and Management
- Change and Configuration management

Low Latency Solutions
- Financial Trading Software

- Colocation and Data centre hosting
